Blood Runed Scimitar  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Lifedraw (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Blood Runed Scimitar
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Lifedraw (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-25 10:14:48
Page Updated:Fri Sep 11th, 2020

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Failed Experiment Beza
Failed Experiment Izah


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth

For the classes that can use this on say FV...

it's great b/c it procs @ lvl 1 :)
▲ Page top
Item drops off of Failed Experiment
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2002 at 1:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252462989
View User Forum
Sage
211 posts
Hello Illia dear

Please update this item link to the Failed Experiment.

Hunters of this mob be wary as this fellow ramages as well as enrages. He can spawn in any spot occupied formerlly by a normal sent, but I have most often seen him as pop in the position closest to the tunnel exit from UD to Castle.

Nice weapon for a lower level, undequipped player. This item is often called for in /ooc when I pull castle mobs for my Upper dog group.

Happy hunting
▲ Page top
Mob
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 1:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250330445
13 posts
I am pretty sure this drops from "a failed experiment". He looks like a Golem, a little transparent, with odd colors mixed in. I think he spawns near or around Velkator area.

RE: Mob

Bow down before the power of hate!!

Lanys T'Vyl

# Aug 17 2002 at 1:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781885634
72 posts
so just buy the velious expantion they still sell it on its own
▲ Page top
RE: Mob
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2002 at 10:13 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591762086122
235 posts
I can't imagine a SK using this weapon. For a non-duel wielder, the ratio is appaulling. You could get a MoSS alot easier than this and it would seriously own this (and theres ALOT better than MoSS out there). Off an easier mob in the same zone, you could get a sword of pain 19/25 50m instaclick grim aura SK only, ALOT better. Not to mention that, for a SK to get this, he would have to deprive a war/bard/rog of it, and for them, it is quite nice. As a general rule, if a duel wielder can use a 1h weapon, a SK/pal shouldnt; he/she can get better easier.
▲ Page top
RE: Mob
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2004 at 1:51 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
With the Sash of the Dragonborn my SK wears, I don't think this is bad at all.
▲ Page top
RE: Mob
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2004 at 3:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343673941
161 posts
this ratio is NOT bad, its not the best, but its far from bad. It may not even be that great for risk vs. reward... but its not bad, Its like a CentiShort with a proc... sorta.
▲ Page top
info
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 5:54 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249615197
9 posts
k i got one of these its fun its off hand usuable since the delay is too high for a warrior to really taunt with at the top end of the game. Its a 45 point life tap proc yes it can be used with boon..however boon taps dont "stack" with weapon procs. Boon taps are thier own independant proc i think the proc for a booned player is round 37 or 38 at lvl 60 i forget now its been a while since i was booned.

This weapon is obviously a bard weapon if you have a bard in group..its not low enough delay to taunt much the proc isnt a monster taunt either after all its only a 45 pt tap and basically bards dont get so many weapons like this.

It drops off "a failed experiment" who rampages an awful lot but we took him with one group, me tanking and using defencive discipline and the enchanter throwing a rune my way ever time i got down round 1.5 bubs of health giving cleric time to ch. He max hit me fer like 185 with disc but mostly low hundreds so he wasnt that harsh.

I suppose a rogue might find some use for this thing in his off hand but honestly..theres a bundle of far superior options out there. Especially if they are of the correct level to be taking this thing out with one group (56+), also an sk wouldnt touch this with a 10 foot pole its no drop and no sk in his right mind is gonna use a 10 dmg 1 hander in his high 50's and as its no great leap for a warrior theres so much more out there then this.

▲ Page top
O.........K
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2001 at 11:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249294755
17 posts
How much is it (average)? Who drops it? And when does it proc?

Bards can follow allmost any diety, myself i follow Veeshan as a bard (but human bards can follow Innoruuk or CT allso i belive)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 16 2001 at 12:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think it's kinda funny that so many druids are whining about not having this weapon. By the time you get this weapon your melee days have long been over. Unless you have a deathwish. Paladins shouldn't use this, obvious reasons. Rangers.... well the evil thing. Bards can use lots of things that don't make sense, ie Cape of Midnight Mist caster and bard only, staff of writhing caster and bard only ect. But bards can be evil, they can follow pretty much anyone Inny Veeshan and I think Cazic and Bert. In closing its obviously a warrior weapon.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 01 2001 at 8:20 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i just want to say i am a warrior and has never fought a ranger that had a chace of winning their just weak warriors or druid wnaabes
Let them have it
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2001 at 9:41 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
whine whine whine whine....I say let them have it. I have faster weapons and with boon I am not so sure that the lifetap will stack. I thinks that it is fair to say that if this is a scimitar and druids can use them then let them use it. How often do you see druids in a group meleeing anyhow. Unless thier is only a single not so well equipt tank, no very often I would say.

So Verant be nice let these guys have thier knife.

lvl51 warrior, 48 enchanter, 31 monk, 38 druid, 43 cleric. not to metion the other 2 account are full also.

have fun its a game

▲ Page top
why druids, rangers, or paladins cannot use
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2001 at 3:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752586081
9 posts
Its a simple reason actually, and if you stopped a moment to think about it you would understand. It is principle. Druids, Rangers and Paladins are life preservers. They do not practice dark arts of necromancy in any way and this weapon procs a nercromantic spell. Stop for just a moment give it some thought and you will understand. It has nothing to do with the type of weapon, it is the type of proc. Thankyou for putting some thought into it Verant. /applaud
▲ Page top
RE: why druids, rangers, or paladins cannot use
QuoteReply

View User Forum
Anonymous

#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 02 2001 at 6:20 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) "give us a chance to live like the rest of norrath"... stop quad-kiting and you may see how the rest of norrath lives; if druids have it so rough, play another class and stop whining
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 25 2001 at 6:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I agree.. all druids should have SOMETHING taken away.. have they ever been nerfed? Not to my knowledge. They have all the best abilities of every caster, they dont have very many useless spells. For example, why the hell would you want True North? Useless.. nt sure if druids get this, but I sure do wish that instead my wizie got something better.
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 19 2001 at 6:30 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Sounds to me like you're whining!

▲ Page top
I can see why this is not for druids...
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2001 at 12:03 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245668574
13 posts
Lifedraw, a necromancer spell (level 12, 45 points max lifetap) is on this scim...
Necros are the masters of death...
Druids are the masters of life in all of its forms, plants, animals, people, etc...
This proc would go intrinsicly against the values of a druid.

So, i can see why we dont get it...
but damn if i wouldnt mind it...

Oh well, I'm a good druid, i dont get hit.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 23 2001 at 11:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ALL I have to say is this, Verant has given every Skill, ability, spell we have to another class to share. Hmm No other class has LoH, Our Tracking is Nothing to BE Desired, Dam we have only one good worthwhile Teleport (mistythicket) we don't have to zone twice to get to a bank. Sow hmm it was good at lvl 14-20 but rangers and shammys get it too, and at higher lvl everyone winds up with Jboots. WIzzies have better Teleports.. Heck our planes gear really suck too, if i ever get any since it doesn't drop (or i haven't personally saw it drop). Give us a chance to live like the rest of norrath and share their skills and abilities.. <Rant Over>
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 07 2001 at 5:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) All enchanters, necromancers, wizards, and magicians start petition-spamming Verant to let ...so casters should be able to use Mace of Shadowed Soul! We suck, we can't solo anything!
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 25 2001 at 5:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) God damn it shut up spoiled brat. Druids are by far the luckiest classs in the game..they can solo, heal, gg, have decent dd and DoT, get wolf form, get pets.. so just shut up about how much durids are getting ripped off. Only problem is having a dr00d in your group. A dr00d is a druid who doesnt know how to play, but can level fast simply because they are druids. I would bet on the fact that around 75% of druids are like this. So STFU and stop complaining.
RE: ALL DRUIDS CHIME IN ON THIS
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2001 at 3:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752586081
9 posts
#1 If you hate it so much, why be one.

#2 Perhaps it isn't the class for you anyway. Druids are not supposed to be evil.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 02 2001 at 11:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ummm... You do know that you have to quest for druid plane armor, right? It doesn't drop off any mob. Also, there are druids out there with full planes armor, you do know that the planes tunic is 17 WIS (I think), thats a hell of alot. There is only like 3 pieces of druid plane armor that don't have +WIS, but they are made for AC and other stats. Like CHA for druid charm.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 01 2001 at 9:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) NOOB! think before your speak, as most of us know that dr00d armor does drop of a mob. lol the quest armor yer thinking of is either kael/new dorf city. i think skyshrine has quests to but i dont know if dr00ds can do em nor do i care. btw, PoG ( plane of growth ) has no druid armor drops.. merely scoutin and cr for myself =\
Uhmm.. no.

Anonymous
First off... it drops in Velk's lab, which probably means the proc doesn't work until the 40+ lvls... and by then, any druid who's in melee doesn't deserve this anyways. Quit your ******** and class envy and go stack some dots or something. =P

# Jul 09 2002 at 10:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250375808
63 posts
Lvl 52 roleplaying bard to counteract that statement, cause I gotta. Ignorance there, yeah, good bards, and bad bards. Only bards and rogues can wear most of the masks, one such mask is very clearly named "Mask of deception" previously called "guise of the deceiver". We can hide/sneak. As well we can pick locks, disarm/detect traps. We are no were close to as skilled as rogue's, however, we aren't nice guys in general. And, just so ya know, bards can worship evil gods. =P

# Jan 23 2001 at 2:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756515749

Lifedraw is what, a 15point lifetap?

In a good fight, odds are it will proc ~3 times... 45healing, 45damage.
▲ Page top
RE: Tanks
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2001 at 6:42 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
lifedraw is a 45pt lifetap, so 3 times would be 135dmg/135hp heal.
▲ Page top
RE: Tanks
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2001 at 5:37 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Still, but the statemnet that a tnak doesn't need to be healed if using this weapon is pointless. Imagine a lvl 30 sk with this weap. Bortas's point about the sword proccing 3 times in a battle is valid. Even 3 x 45 = 135 hp. Is that enough to keep a tank going? What if he's a SK with especially high taunt value, or the main tank. The proc won't happen enough to keep a tank going in a battle. Now if you had say 150 dex, maybe that might change things. I don't think it would be enough help even then.

Ndarain
Speedy DE SK
▲ Page top
RE: Tanks
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2001 at 5:08 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591754685027
2 posts
With 2400+ hps, no it wouldn't heal me enough to do away with a healer. However, I'm all for anything that helps my cleric heal me, if I can draw 45hps from a mob while causing 45 points dmg it's a win/win for the cleric and me.

Tempting Fait
A Warrior Princess on Tarew Marr
Silent Ascension

But if the Tank knows its a basicly a 50/50 shot with a certian mob then chances are its gonna improve a bit in his/her/its favor..tho some mobs have been know to have the effect "Kill him cheaply..he's gained to much Xp in one day" which can be ...well not good ;p

Lifedraw is a of the Lifetap spell line, and it takes away 45hp from your enemy, and well needless to say but ill say it anyways (since somepoeple get confused) it gives you 45hp. so actully its a very usefull spell to have procing for you in a fight.
